title: derris scandens var. saharanpurensis
intro: Derris scandens var. saharanpurensis is a variety of the Derris scandens plant, a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Derris scandens var. saharanpurensis include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In Ayurvedic medicine, the plant is used in various herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to treat various health conditions.
